_comment: Intentional, reasoned exceptions for the license-consistency checker (see .github/scripts/license_consistency.py). Every entry must explain WHY the detected/claimed license deviates from a single plain OSS SPDX id. Nothing is silently 'passed' — un-listed drift fails CI. Private repos and (by default) archived repos are not checked.

platform.reason: Intentionally proprietary flagship suite. LICENSE is a custom proprietary text (SPDX-License-Identifier: LicenseRef-SZL-Proprietary), so GitHub reports NOASSERTION by design. README badge + CITATION.cff must therefore claim proprietary, NOT an OSS license.

szl-lake.reason: Dual-licensed data lake: datasets under CC-BY-4.0 (the license GitHub detects from LICENSE), code/tooling under Apache-2.0. The README badge intentionally cites both.
